audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences within sbind.c are properly guarded. The `passwd` pointer is null-checked (lines 73, 105) before `strlen(passwd)` in both functions. The `ld` pointer is only dereferenced via `LDAP_VALID(ld)` (expands to `(ld)->ld_valid`) inside an `assert()` in `ldap_simple_bind`, ordered after `assert(ld != NULL)`, ensuring no null deref in debug builds; in production (NDEBUG) both asserts compile away and `ld` is never dereferenced in sbind.c at all. `ldap_simple_bind_s` contains no deref of `ld` in sbind.c.
